name: homepage_0_home

observed_strengths.observation: Meta title and description are strong: 'Tentree | Sustainable Clothing—Every Item Plants 10 Trees' + 'Made with Hemp, Organic Cotton, Recycled Polyester & Tencel. Every Item Plants 10 Trees. 120+ Million Planted.' — clear mission differentiation and material specificity
CLIMATE+ collection in main nav — dedicated eco-upgraded line signals a premium sustainability tier for higher-intent mission-driven buyers
Free shipping announcement in H2 ('Free Shipping on All Orders. Ends Friday at Midnight.') — time-limited free shipping creates urgency that nudges fence-sitters to buy this week

missing_or_weak.observation: No H1 on homepage — all 5 headings are H2 promotional banners ('Up to 50% Off', 'Deepest Discounts: 30-50% Off', 'Free Shipping'). The homepage has no primary heading, weakening SEO and denying first-time visitors an immediate statement of brand identity

OG title and OG description are both empty strings — social share previews on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter will render with no image title or description, producing blank or broken cards that reduce click-through from social media

Homepage is dominated by discount messaging ('Up to 50% Off Almost Everything' appears twice) — the environmental mission ('10 trees per item', B Corp, organic materials) that differentiates tentree from fast fashion is absent from homepage headings; sale-only entry devalues the brand story for first-time visitors

purchase_path_notes: Homepage drives urgency via sale promotions but suppresses the mission narrative that is tentree's primary conversion differentiator from commodity apparel. First-time visitors arrive to a clearance-mode experience with no brand H1 and no OG tags for social sharing.
